description: Implements ADR-2604011300 P11: inline diff viewer, interactive model picker overlay, file context injection via /add, and session sidebar toggled by F2.

done: hex-cli/src/tui/chat.rs — full streaming TUI with hooks, MCP client, tool use loop (P1-P10 complete)
hex-cli/src/tui/skills.rs — slash commands, user skills, /hex command
hex-cli/src/tui/session.rs — session persistence with list_recent() and preview()

phases.name: Inline diff rendering
phases.description: Detect and colorize unified diff output inside Role::Tool messages. Pure rendering change in render_messages().

tasks.name: Add is_diff_content() helper and colorize diff lines in render_messages
tasks.description: In chat.rs, add fn is_diff_content(content: &str) -> bool that returns true if any line starts with '+++ ' or '--- ' or '@@ '. In render_messages(), when rendering a Role::Tool message, check each line: if it starts with '+' → Color::Green, '-' → Color::Red, '@@ ' → Color::Cyan, otherwise Color::Gray. Apply this to the full tool content block. Satisfies S01.

phases.name: File context injection (/add, /files, /remove)
phases.description: Add /add <path> and /files slash commands. Store file contents in ChatApp. Inject into system prompt via merged_system(). Show file count in status bar.

tasks.name: Add context_files field and /add, /files, /remove commands to skills.rs
tasks.description: In skills.rs: Add SkillResult::AddFile { path: String, content: String } and SkillResult::RemoveFile(String) variants. Add '/add' arm: reads file at rest path, returns AddFile or Lines([error]) if not found. Add '/files' arm: requires files list — return SkillResult::ListFiles (new variant that ChatApp handles to display). Add '/remove' arm: returns RemoveFile(name). Update /help. Add dispatch() 'files' parameter: &[(String,String)] for context_files. Satisfies S05, S06, S10.

tasks.name: Add context_files to ChatApp and wire /add into merged_system
tasks.description:
In chat.rs: Add context_files: Vec<(String, String)> field (path, content) to ChatApp struct. Initialize as Vec::new() in ChatApp::new(). In apply_skill_result(): handle AddFile by pushing to context_files; RemoveFile by removing by name; ListFiles by building a Lines message. In merged_system(): if context_files is non-empty, append '

## Files in context
' followed by each file as fenced code block. In render_status(): if context_files non-empty, append ' · N file(s)' to status string. Update dispatch() call sites to pass &app.context_files. Satisfies S05, S06, S07.

phases.name: Overlay state machine (model picker + session sidebar)
phases.description: Add Overlay enum to ChatApp. Route key events through overlay handler when active. Render overlays as centered/side popups using ratatui::widgets::Clear.

tasks.name: Add Overlay enum and overlay field to ChatApp
tasks.description: In chat.rs, add: enum Overlay { ModelPicker { items: Vec<serde_json::Value>, cursor: usize }, SessionSidebar { sessions: Vec<ChatSession>, cursor: usize } }. Add overlay: Option<Overlay> field to ChatApp, initialized None. Add fn overlay_key() method to ChatApp that handles Up/Down/Enter/Esc for each overlay variant. For ModelPicker Enter: set self.model to selected item's name field (or 'name'/'id' from JSON), close overlay. For SessionSidebar Enter: call restore_session() with selected session, close overlay. Satisfies S04, S09.

tasks.name: Model picker: /model no-args triggers async fetch + opens overlay
tasks.description: In skills.rs, change '/model' no-args case from Lines([usage]) to return SkillResult::OpenModelPicker. In chat.rs, add SkillResult::OpenModelPicker handling in apply_skill_result(): spawn a tokio task that fetches GET {nexus_url}/api/inference/endpoints (with auth header from app.auth_token), parses JSON array, and sends StreamEvent::OverlayOpen(items) via token_tx. Add StreamEvent::OverlayOpen(Vec<serde_json::Value>) variant. In handle_token_events(): on OverlayOpen, set app.overlay = Some(Overlay::ModelPicker { items, cursor: 0 }). If items empty, push Skill message with S11 fallback text instead. Satisfies S02, S03, S11.

tasks.name: Session sidebar: F2 key opens sidebar from disk
tasks.description: In run_event_loop() key handler, add arm for KeyCode::F(2): call ChatSession::list_recent(10), set app.overlay = Some(Overlay::SessionSidebar { sessions, cursor: 0 }). In the key event handler at the top of the loop, check if app.overlay.is_some() first: if yes, call app.overlay_key(key.code) and skip normal input handling. Satisfies S08, S09.

tasks.name: Render overlays: centered model picker + right session sidebar
tasks.description: In chat.rs render(), after all normal widgets, check app.overlay: For ModelPicker: compute centered rect (60% width, min(item_count+4, 20) height); clear it with Clear widget; render Block with title 'Select Model'; render StatefulList or Paragraph with each item's name, highlighting cursor row in Cyan Bold. For SessionSidebar: use a right-side 30-column area (full height); clear it with Clear; render Block 'Sessions (F2)'; each row: date + preview, cursor row highlighted Cyan. Update /help text to mention /add, /files, F2. Satisfies S08, S03, S04.

phases.name: Build gate + status bar hint update
phases.description: Full release build, update /help and status bar hint to mention F2 and /add.

tasks.name: Update status bar hint and /help
tasks.description: In render_status(), add 'F2 sessions' to the hint string. In /help in skills.rs, add '/add <path>' and '/files' and '/remove <name>' entries, and note 'F2: session sidebar'. Satisfies completeness of all new features.

mergeOrder: P1.1 and P2.1 and P3.1 are independent — parallel

riskRegister.risk: Overlay Clear widget requires ratatui >= 0.26 for proper layering
riskRegister.mitigation: Clear is available since ratatui 0.20 — already in deps

riskRegister.risk: context_files with large files bloats system prompt, hitting token limits
riskRegister.mitigation: Cap each file at 50KB and total context_files at 200KB with user-visible warning

riskRegister.risk: F2 key code varies by terminal emulator
riskRegister.mitigation: Also bind Ctrl+S as fallback for session sidebar

successCriteria: Diff output in tool results shows +/- lines in green/red
/model with no args opens a picker showing nexus providers
Selecting a model in the picker switches the session model
/add src/main.rs adds the file and confirms; /files lists it; model sees it in next turn
F2 opens session sidebar; Enter resumes selected session
cargo build -p hex-cli --release succeeds with no errors
